name: add_example_design_repo
short_description: Adds a repository of user/custom example designs
full_help:
add_example_design_repo

Description: 
Adds a repository of user/custom example designs

Syntax: 
add_example_design_repo  -repo_path <arg> [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
Adds a repository of user/custom example designs

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  -repo_path  Repo Path that contains Example design
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
IPIntegrator

arguments.description: Repo Path that contains Example design
Suspend message limits during command execution
